name: Green Tomato Pie#2
recipeInstructions:
1. Slice tomatoes as thin as possible, then quarter the slices.
2. Mix dry ingredients and add to tomatoes, reserving 3 tablespoons.
3. Add remaining ingredients (lemon juice, sherry, and butter) and gently toss to distribute.
4. Set aside for sugar to soak for 1 hour.
5. Place one crust in pie plate and sprinkle with reserved dry ingredients.
6. Fill with tomatoes and juice. Dot with pieces of butter.
7. Cover with top crust, seal edges, and vent.
8. Bake at 400°F for 15 minutes, then reduce temperature to 350°F and bake for about 1 1/4 hours, until pastry is golden.
9. Sprinkle top with 1-2 tablespoons additional sugar.
10. Cuts better the next day when cold. Serves 6-8.
